name: Igor Girkin (Strelkov)
role: Russian GRU Colonel; DNR 'Defence Minister' July 2014; convicted in absentia of murder, sentenced to life imprisonment (Nov 2022)
quote: In the vicinity of Torez, we just downed a plane, an AN-26. It is lying somewhere in the Progress Mine. We have issued warnings not to fly in our airspace.

name: Sergey Dubinsky
role: Russian GRU intelligence officer; DNR intelligence chief; convicted in absentia of murder, sentenced to life imprisonment (Nov 2022)
quote: All aviation has been shot down over Donetsk region. We warned — if you fly in our sky, you'll be shot down.

name: Leonid Kharchenko
role: Ukrainian separatist field commander under DNR; convicted in absentia of murder, sentenced to life imprisonment (Nov 2022)
quote: I was just a field commander. I had nothing to do with decisions about anti-aircraft systems.

name: Oleg Pulatov
role: Russian GRU officer; DNR deputy commander; the only MH17 suspect to appoint legal representation; acquitted November 2022
quote: My client denies any involvement in the downing of MH17 and maintains he had no role in operations involving the Buk system.

name: Mark Rutte
role: Prime Minister of the Netherlands (2010–2024); led Dutch government response to MH17 including repatriation, investigation support, and accountability demands
quote: We want the perpetrators to be brought to justice. The Netherlands will not rest until that goal is achieved.

name: Wilbert Paulissen
role: Head of Dutch National Criminal Investigation Service; JIT lead investigator; announced 53rd Brigade link at May 2018 press conference
quote: We are convinced that our findings justify the conclusions that the BUK-TELAR which was used came from the 53rd Brigade which is part of the military of the Russian Federation.

name: Fred Westerbeke
role: Chief National Prosecutor, Netherlands (2012–2019); led the JIT criminal investigation; announced the four suspects in June 2019
quote: We are ready to prosecute these four suspects. We call on them to cooperate with the investigation. If they do not, we will prosecute them in absentia.

name: Dedy Woei-A-Sioe
role: Dutch Chief Prosecutor MH17 trial (2019–2022); led prosecution at Schiphol Judicial Complex; requested life imprisonment for all four defendants
quote: The defendants caused the deaths of 298 people through their coordinated actions. The prosecution demands life imprisonment for all four suspects.

name: Vladimir Putin
role: President of the Russian Federation; consistently denied Russian state involvement in MH17; blocked UN tribunal via UNSC veto (July 2015); refused extradition
quote: Russia has nothing to do with this [MH17]. We need to draw objective and unbiased conclusions based on the investigation.

name: Najib Razak
role: Prime Minister of Malaysia (2009–2018); led Malaysian response to MH17; negotiated black-box handover; joined JIT; was also embroiled in domestic 1MDB scandal
quote: We are determined to see justice for the victims of MH17. Malaysia will not rest until we find answers.

name: Tony Abbott
role: Prime Minister of Australia (2013–2015); co-sponsored UNSC Resolution 2166; led Australian push for a UN tribunal; 27 Australian citizens killed
quote: We will not rest until the perpetrators of this crime are brought to justice. Russia must cooperate with the investigation.

name: Julie Bishop
role: Australian Foreign Minister (2013–2018); key advocate for MH17 accountability; led diplomatic push at UNSC; pursued Russia's liability at international forums
quote: We will never stop pursuing justice for the 298 people who were killed on MH17.

name: Pieter Omtzigt
role: Dutch MP (CDA); chairman of Dutch parliamentary committee on MH17; dogged advocate for families and accountability; pushed for international tribunal
quote: Families deserve truth, justice, and reparation. We must pursue every legal avenue to hold Russia accountable for MH17.

name: Eliot Higgins
role: Founder, Bellingcat; led OSINT investigation that identified the Buk as from Russia's 53rd Brigade; pioneered open-source accountability journalism
quote: Using open-source methods we identified the specific Buk vehicle, traced it to Russia's 53rd Brigade, and documented its entire journey on July 17, 2014. The evidence is overwhelming.

name: Piet Ploeg
role: Chairman, Association of Relatives of Victims of Disaster MH17 (Stichting Vliegramp MH17); lost brother, sister-in-law, and nephew; became leading voice for victims' families
quote: We lost everything on July 17. We want justice — not just the verdict, but the actual sentencing of those responsible. The convictions mean everything to the families.
